title: Competent Visuals
description: Competent Visuals seeks to create a user experience that feels refreshed and clean, ultimately making Minecraft more visually appealing by introducing new colors to every GUI and some Items.
body:
AI generated Icon

**This is a modified version of "Powr Visuals"**

Back to the original: [Powr Visuals](https://modrinth.com/project/powr-visuals)

#  Simple Elegance, Animated Detail

Experience Minecraft with a fresh perspective through **Competent Visuals**. This resource pack carefully balances simplicity and visual enhancement, offering a cohesive black, grey, and white theme that provides a clean and updated look without losing the familiar essence of vanilla Minecraft.

## Key Features:

* **Clean & Modern Aesthetic:** Immerse yourself in a striking black, grey, and white color palette for a refined visual experience.
* **Vanilla Inspired:** Competent Visuals thoughtfully orients itself around Minecraft's original textures, ensuring a familiar yet revitalized feel.
* **Subtle Animations:** Discover a new layer of dynamism with carefully integrated animations that bring various in-game elements to life.
* **Enhanced Clarity:** Enjoy a visually cleaner interface and world, allowing key details to stand out.

**Competent Visuals** aims to provide a subtle yet impactful visual upgrade for your Minecraft world. Enjoy the simplicity and the added touch of animation!

## Supported Mods:
- **AppleSkin** by squeek502
- **Enchanting Infuser** by Fuzs
- **Iris Shaders** by coderbot
- **Mod Menu** by Terraformers
- **Shulkerbox Tooltip** by MisterPeModder
- **Trade Cycling** by henkelmax
- **Travelers Backpack** by Tiviacz1337
- **Trinkets** by Emi
- **Xaeros Minimap** by thexaero
- **Xaeros Worldmap** by thexaero

## Credits:
**Vanilla Tweaks** for the Item Stiching Fix, Unique Dyes, Lower Shield and Lower Fire:
[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

## Additional Information:

This pack was made for the german Minecraft community-project "MineAttack". Specifically "MineAttack VI". 
  
I advise you to keep this resource pack updated at all times to avoid loading issues.

Thanks for viewing/downloading :)
